changes.test: Container name set inside a shadow tree should match query using ::part on the outside
Container name set inside a shadow tree should match query for host child on the outside
Container name set on :host from inside a shadow tree should match query for slotted from the outside of the shadow tree
Outer scope query should match container-name set by :host rule in shadow tree
Outer scope query should match container-name set by ::slotted rule in shadow tree
